title: Filve

'''Filve''' was the [[Temperature/Legends|hot]], dry [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Filvian]]s in the [[Dufilvian sector/Legends|Dufilvian sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].

==Description==
It was the location of an Imperial [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] and served as a major [[Starship/Legends|starship]] service, trade, and information hub. It was also the homeworld of one of the four Human directors of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]].<ref name="CoD">''[[Cloak of Deception]]''</ref> A number of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] wealthiest corporations, such as [[Sienar]] and [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]], opened branch offices on Filve.<ref name="TLCSb" />

Its [[Desert/Legends|deserts]] were punctuated by giant, self-contained, climate-controlled [[City/Legends|cities]] where both natives and offworlders could avoid the harsh environment. The cities were interlocked, so outdoor travel between them could completely be avoided. The planet had a population of 6 billion.

==History==
Early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Filve received much punishment from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces, both from actual attacks on the planet and damage from battles occurring above it. By the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Filve had been showing strong support for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].<ref name="SWR">[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]</ref>

The [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] ''[[Dominant]]'' was assigned to the defense of the [[Dulfilvian system]] following its commission. It was later reassigned to Filve's reserve fleet.<ref name="TTaBSb">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref>

In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] the planet was [[Battle of Filve|attacked]] by the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Judicator/Legends|''Judicator'']] as part of a diversion that sent [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces from [[Ord Pardron/Legends|Ord Pardron]] there, and eventually back to Ord Pardron, keeping them away from nearby [[Ukio/Legends|Ukio]]. [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] attempted to negotiate with the Filvian governor, though [[Joruus C'baoth]] ordered the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] destroyed.

==Behind the scenes==
The PC game [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] mistakenly places the [[Dufilvian sector/Legends|Dufilvan sector]] (a misspelling of the true [[Dufilvian sector/Legends|Dufilvian sector]]) and, consequently, Filve, in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It also uses a graphic of a planet with oceans to represent the world.
